source_pr.title: planner: support hint for IndexHashJoin and IndexMergeJoin
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
~1. fix issue https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/12309~
2. support hint for IndexHashJoin and IndexMergeJoin

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Integration test

Code changes

N/A

Side effects

N/A

Related changes

N/A

Release note

N/A

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds planner hint support for IndexHashJoin/IndexMergeJoin and updates related plan/EXPLAIN tests. The case evidence does not include a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization change (it also contains a go.mod hash line), so avoid guessing the root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
